intent: In DATA_DIR there is a 10x matrix triplet for one PBMC sample — files prefixed GSM5746268_MGI0369_1_SLAB-C1-C1. Run a standard Seurat workflow in R: load, QC, normalize, PCA, neighbors, clustering, UMAP, and FindAllMarkers; show me a UMAP and the top markers per cluster.

blocks.text: Good — I can see the three 10x samples. I'll focus on GSM5746268 as you requested. Now let me read the Seurat recipe to plan the workflow:

blocks.content: {"status": "ok", "name": "seurat-scrna", "description": "Authoritative single-cell RNA-seq QC + clustering + cluster annotation with R/Seurat (v5).", "body": "scRNA-seq QC + clustering + annotation with R/Seurat v5 (standard PBMC3k workflow). Provision: ensure_capability('Seurat'), then library(Seurat). THE THREE CHOICES THAT DEFINE THE RESULT \u2014 surface them with present_plan before committing: (1) QC thresholds (subset cutoffs on nFeature_RNA and percent.mt); (2) number of PCs/dims (read off the ElbowPlot); (3) clustering resolution (FindClusters). Steps: ReadMtx -> CreateSeuratObject(min.cells=3,min.features=200) -> PercentageFeatureSet('^MT-') -> subset QC -> NormalizeData -> FindVariableFeatures -> ScaleData -> RunPCA -> FindNeighbors -> FindClusters -> RunUMAP -> JoinLayers -> FindAllMarkers. Load ggplot2 and dplyr explicitly; never library(tidyverse)."}

blocks.text: Now let me present a plan with sensible defaults for this workflow:

input.title: Seurat v5 QC, clustering, and marker analysis for GSM5746268
input.summary: Load 10x count matrix, run QC filtering, normalize, find variable features, scale, compute PCA and UMAP, cluster, and identify marker genes per cluster.

steps.title: Load 10x matrix triplet and create Seurat object
steps.description: Read MTX+barcodes+features, create object with min.cells=3 and min.features=200

steps.title: QC: mitochondrial % and plot distributions
steps.description: Calculate percent.mt (genes matching '^MT-' pattern), visualize nFeature_RNA and percent.mt

steps.title: PCA and neighbor graph
steps.description: RunPCA (default 30 dims), FindNeighbors, inspect ElbowPlot to confirm dims for clustering

steps.title: Clustering and UMAP
expected_outputs: Cluster sizes; UMAP plot colored by cluster

steps.title: Find all markers and summarize top genes per cluster
steps.description: FindAllMarkers (Wilcox test, logfc.threshold=0.25), report top 5 per cluster
expected_outputs: Table of top markers; marker heatmap or feature plot

assumptions: Using GSM5746268 sample only (single PBMC sample)
Standard mammalian mitochondrial gene prefix is 'MT-'
Clustering resolution 0.5 (intermediate; adjust if result looks under/over-clustered)
PCA dims from ElbowPlot; if unclear, use 15–30
